XOnlineQueryAdd

Adds an entry to a dataset.

HRESULT XOnlineQueryAdd(
    DWORD dwUserIndex,
    ULONGLONG qwTeamId,
    DWORD dwDatasetId,
    DWORD dwNumAttributes,
    const XONLINE_ATTRIBUTE *pAttributes,
    HANDLE hWorkEvent,
    PXONLINETASK_HANDLE *phTask
);

Parameters

dwUserIndex
[in] Controller index (zero-based) of the player. The player must have been successfully logged on with a previous call to XOnlineLogon.
qwTeamId
[in] Team ID. Used only when the entry to be added is to be associated with a team. Otherwise, this parameter should be set to 0.
dwDatasetId
[in] ID of dataset to which the new entry is added.
dwNumAttributes
[in] Number of competition attributes in the array specified by the pAttributes parameter.
pAttributes
[in] Pointer to array of XONLINE_ATTRIBUTE structures containing the values to be added. The order and IDs of the structures must match that of the dataset. Attributes with default values may be omitted.
hWorkEvent
[in, optional] Handle to an event you want to associate with this task. If you do not want to assign an event, set this parameter to NULL.
phTask
[out] Pointer to an XONLINETASK_HANDLE type. The handle is associated with the task started by XOnlineQueryAdd.

Return Values

Returns S_OK if successful, an error code otherwise. The error codes can include the following.

Error Code Description
XONLINE_E_QUERY_QUOTA_FULL The player or team's quota for the dataset is full. One or more entities must be removed before anything else can be added. For information on how to remove entities from the dataset, see XOnlineQueryRemove and XOnlineQueryRemoveId.
XONLINE_E_QUERY_ATTRIBUTE_TOO_LONG One of the attributes in the array passed through the pAttributes parameter has a value that exceeds the maximum length configured for the dataset.
XONLINE_E_QUERY_UNEXPECTED_ATTRIBUTE An attribute was included that does not exist in the dataset, or a required attribute is missing.
XONLINE_E_QUERY_DATASET_NOT_FOUND The specified dataset ID was not found.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

XOnlineQueryAddGetResults, XOnlineCompetitionCreate, XOnlineCompetitionCreateSingleElimination
